overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a medieval European village at night. The character navigates narrow cobblestone alleys and open squares between stone and timber-framed buildings illuminated by warm torchlight against a cool, cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between tall stone buildings

events.description: character approaches and passes through large wooden gate set in stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow alley, passing wooden wheelbarrows and a makeshift shelter with sacks

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with small windows rising above the alley
tall weathered stone wall with patches of grass at base
wooden cart with single wheel leaning against the wall
rough wooden awning structure covering burlap sacks and barrels
heavy reinforced wooden gate with metal bands set in stone archway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by tall stone buildings. The character walks forward past wooden carts and a makeshift shelter, approaching a large wooden gate that marks the transition to a new area. Warm torchlight illuminates the cool blue stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with church and timber-framed houses

events.description: encountering two NPCs sitting on bench outside timber-framed building

agents.ego_description: walking through open village square, observing surroundings and passing villagers

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting on wooden bench outside a timber house

entered.detail: white plaster church with dark timber framing and tall gothic windows
traditional half-timbered building with white plaster infill
simple wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens into a village square with a prominent white church on the right and timber-framed houses on the left. The character walks past two NPCs sitting on a bench and continues toward a narrow passage, with the cloudy night sky fully visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered passage between high stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage with high walls on both sides, approaching a covered gate structure

entered.detail: high stone wall with wooden scaffolding and platforms
wooden stall structure with awning against the right wall
overhead wooden bridge or gate structure connecting buildings across the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow passage flanked by high stone walls and wooden market stalls. The path leads toward a covered gate structure overhead, with the environment becoming darker and more enclosed as the character progresses through the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with guards and market stalls

events.description: approaching group of guards in red uniforms carrying torches

agents.ego_description: walking along village street, approaching and passing guards with torches

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red uniforms standing with torches

entered.detail: wooden picket fence running along left side of path
cluster of medieval village buildings with steep roofs
group of guards in red uniforms with torches standing near wooden barrels
stack of wooden barrels and market crates

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the character enters a wider village street lined with wooden fences and houses. The character approaches a group of guards in red uniforms carrying torches, passing wooden barrels and market stalls as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village, transitioning from narrow, torchlit alleys into open squares and back into enclosed passages. It begins in a tight cobblestone alley flanked by tall stone buildings and wooden carts, moving forward until it passes through a large wooden gate. As the character emerges from the gate, the environment opens into a village square featuring a prominent white church and timber-framed houses under a cloudy night sky. The scene then shifts back into a darker, more enclosed passage lined with high stone walls and market stalls before passing under a covered gate structure. Finally, the camera exits the narrow passage into a wider village street, moving past wooden fences and barrels toward a group of torch-bearing guards in red uniforms.
